notes: Treats DingDong as the central source for Prompts, Skills, and MCP resources distributed to supported coding Agents.
Synchronizes global always-on Prompts to both Codex AGENTS.md and Claude Code CLAUDE.md managed blocks.
Adds a persistent Issues workspace for Skill conflicts, invalid Agent configuration, and other resource synchronization problems.
Protects user-owned Skills with preflight checks, transactional rollback, and managed-copy cleanup after Skill renames.
Warns when enabled Claude Code plugins expose a Skill with the same name and centralizes client paths in an Agent adapter registry.
Shows an orange-red dot beside the app version when a newer DingDong release is available.
